name: Master Assassin
author: Poki
description: Master Assassin is a stealthy action game where silence is your greatest weapon! Sneak through shadows, stay out of sight, and strike your targets from behind before they see you coming. Each level sharpens your skills as the challenges grow tougher. Earn gems, unlock cool character customizations, and prove you have what it takes. Can you become the ultimate silent killer? How to play Master Assassin? Click or tap to move. Who created Master Assassin? Master Assassin is created by Vanorium. Play their other games on Poki: Stickman Archers: Waves , Stickman Fight: Ragdoll , Noob Drive and Noob Archer ! How can I play Master Assassin for free? You can play Master Assassin for free on Poki. Can I play Master Assassin on mobile devices and desktop? Master Assassin can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
